Delayed Gates Sequences
The following gate sequences are used in the delayed gates obfuscation method:
• (Y, S, Y)
• (H, S, H, S, H)
• (X, H, Z, H, X)
• (H, T, T, H, T, T, H)
• (Z, H, Y, H, Z)
• (S, Z, Sdg)
• (T, S, Tdg)
• (SWAP, X, SWAP)
• (Y, X, Y, X, Y)
